generated_oml:
instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors integrated into Building Control Systems (BCS) for capturing operational data, modeled within BIM to support real-time data synchronization with digital twins."
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance LightSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors integrated into Building Control Systems (BCS) for capturing operational data, modeled within BIM to support real-time data synchronization with digital twins."
    DTDFVocab:producedData LightDataTransmitted
]

instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors integrated into Building Control Systems (BCS) for capturing operational data, modeled within BIM to support real-time data synchronization with digital twins."
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
]

instance LightDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LightSensor
]

instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature data from Building Control Systems sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, EclipseDitto
]

instance LightData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time light data from Building Control Systems sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LightDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, EclipseDitto
]

instance OccupancyData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time occupancy data from Building Control Systems sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, EclipseDitto
]

instance BIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Building Information Modeling (BIM) enriched with device-specific metadata for sensors, actuators, and controllers"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelDrivenEngineering, BIMTools
]

instance MiddlewareConfig : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Middleware configuration details for Eclipse Hono and Ditto"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, EclipseDitto
]

instance EclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono for IoT device connectivity"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, EnergyOptimizationService, VisualComfortManagementService, NonVisualHealthEffectsAnalysisService
]

instance EclipseDitto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Ditto for digital twin management"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, SimulationService, ThreeDVisualizationService, PerformanceAnalysisService
]

instance UnrealEngine5 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5 for 3D visualization"
    DTDFVocab:enables ThreeDVisualizationService
]

instance BIMTools : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Building Information Modeling (BIM) tools"
    DTDFVocab:enables BIMModelGenerationService
]

instance ModelDrivenEngineering : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering (MDE) methodologies for automated transformations"
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelDrivenDeploymentService
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of building systems"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeMonitoringInsight
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Building simulation for operational scenarios"

]

]

    base:desc "Visual comfort management service"

]

instance NonVisualHealthEffectsAnalysisService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Non-visual health effects analysis service"
    DTDFVocab:provides NonVisualHealthInsight
]

instance ThreeDVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "3D visualization of building models and data"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance PerformanceAnalysisService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Performance analysis for building operations"
    DTDFVocab:provides PerformanceInsight
]

instance BIMModelGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Automated generation of BIM models from metadata"

]

instance ModelDrivenDeploymentService : DTDFVocab:Service [

]

]

    base:desc "Actuators within Building Control Systems (BCS), modeled directly within BIM environments to enable automated deployment of digital twins for operational control."
]

    base:desc "Controllers within Building Control Systems (BCS), modeled directly within BIM environments to enable automated deployment of digital twins for operational control."
]

instance LivingLabBuilding : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Building infrastructure in AECO domain, exemplified by Living Lab case study"

]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Bidirectional communication enabled by Eclipse Hono and Ditto for sending control signals to Building Control Systems (BCS), though specific control protocols are not detailed in the document."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time synchronization with continuous data flow; specific time intervals or rates are not specified in the document."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A modular, service-oriented platform integrating BIM as the semantic backbone, Eclipse Hono/Ditto middleware for bidirectional data exchange, Unreal Engine for visualization, and standardized extension points for custom services, enabling holistic building life cycle management."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Entire building life cycle, including design, construction, operation, refurbishment, and adaptations during operation, with the digital twin covering as-operated representations of physical assets."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Evaluation of digital twin interoperability and architectural soundness using the Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric, though specific verification/validation mechanisms beyond this metric are not detailed."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono and Ditto middleware for real-time data exchange; specific IoT protocols (e.g., MQTT, AMQP) are not detailed in the document."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "BIM standards for semantic representation and standardized extension points for modular service integration, addressing fragmented data sources through unified integration frameworks."
]
